mapper.select: select post_no as no , user_id as "user.id" , post_header as "header.id" , post_board_type as "boardType.id" , post_title as title , post_content as content , post_created_date as createdDate , post_updated_date as updatedDate , post_view_count as viewCount , post_upvote_count as upvoteCount , post_is_spoiler as isSpoiler from movmov_community_posts where post_no = #{postNo}

select post_no as no , user_id as "user.id" , post_header as "header.id" , post_board_type as "boardType.id" , post_title as title , post_content as content , post_created_date as createdDate , post_updated_date as updatedDate , post_view_count as viewCount , post_upvote_count as upvoteCount , post_is_spoiler as isSpoiler from movmov_community_posts where post_board_type = #{boardNo} and post_is_deleted = 'N'
